about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We make a difference in the lighting industry with our vision and mission
about.description1: Since 2003, our company has been operating in the lighting sector and has signed Turkey's largest lighting projects.
about.description2: With our expert engineering team and state-of-the-art equipment, we aim to provide the highest quality service to our customers.

benefits.title: Energy Efficiency
benefits.description: Energy-saving solutions with high-efficiency LED technologies

benefits.title: Eco-Friendly
benefits.description: Sustainable and environmentally sensitive lighting systems

benefits.title: 7/24 Technical Support
benefits.description: Uninterrupted technical support and maintenance services

benefits.title: International Standards
benefits.description: ISO, CE, RoHS international quality certificates

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To maintain customer satisfaction at the highest level with sustainable, innovative and aesthetic lighting solutions, contribute to energy efficiency and be a pioneer in the industry.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a global brand that is referenced in smart lighting systems in Turkey and the world, combining technology and design, producing sustainable solutions.

slides.title: In
slides.description: With over 20 years of experience, as Turkey's leading lighting engineering company, we offer energy-efficient, environmentally friendly and aesthetic lighting solutions.

slides.title: Electrical Contracting
slides.description: We strengthen your space with modern systems and are with you at every stage from design to implementation.

slides.title: Smart Lighting
slides.description: We increase energy efficiency and maximize user comfort with advanced automation systems such as DALI, DMX, KNX.

sectionHeader.subtitle: Our Services
sectionHeader.title: Services
sectionHeader.description: Comprehensive lighting solutions with modern technologies and our expert team

descriptions.facade: Aesthetics and energy efficiency with custom LED lighting solutions for modern building facades.
descriptions.industrial: Professional lighting systems for factories, warehouses and industrial facilities.
descriptions.landscape: Environmentally friendly LED lighting solutions for gardens, parks and open areas.
descriptions.road: Safe and economical lighting systems for urban and intercity roads.
descriptions.energy: Lighting systems integrated with renewable energy sources.
descriptions.smart: IoT-based smart lighting control and management systems.
